<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Sivu-1" id="oDmFS4nBQJ8L83STDQkZ"> <mxGraphModel dx="1311" dy="1415" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" source="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-10" value="Set Button_Reset to False<div><br></div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Button pressed" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="340" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-15" edge="1" parent="1" source="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="280" y="480" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="First" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="220" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-29" edge="1" parent="1" source="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-28" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Second" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="470" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-11" edge="1" parent="1" source="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-10" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-13" edge="1" parent="1" source="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-18" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-17" value="
<span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family: Helvetica; font-size: 12px; font-style: normal; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: center; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; white-space: normal; background-color: rgb(236, 236, 236); text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial; display: inline !important; float: none;">Set Second_Presss to true and sleep for 3 seconds</span>

"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="280" y="430" as="sourcePoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-22" edge="1" parent="1" source="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-17" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-21"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="100" x="230" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-25" edge="1" parent="1" source="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-21" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-24" value="Add 1 to count"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-21" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Single_Press()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="220" y="690" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-27" edge="1" parent="1" source="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-24" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" buzzer on and off for each time the drawer has been opened since last reset" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="120" x="220" y="810" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-26" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;rounded=0;" value="Turn motor on for the drawer to open" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="220" y="940" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-31" edge="1" parent="1" source="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-28" id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-28" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Doubl<span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">e_Press()</span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="470" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-33" edge="1" parent="1" source="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-30" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-32" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-30" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Set count to 0" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="470" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MfiSkdmOVSF3d0o3fpah-32" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Flash off LED" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="470" y="790" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
